entity.label: Laishah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place mentioned in Isa. 10:30. It has been supposed to be the modern el-Isawiyeh, about a mile north-east of Jerusalem.

nodes.label: Laishah
nodes.description: A place mentioned in Isa. 10:30. It has been supposed to be the modern el-Isawiyeh, about a mile north-east of Jerusalem.

verses.text: Lift up thy voice, O daughter of Gallim: cause it to be heard unto Laish, O poor Anathoth.
